ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated state code */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the data belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, coastal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_locations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., research institution, government agency) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user (e.g., meteorology, climatology) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the station */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES station_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., error report, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES station_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was made */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., maintenance, observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_notes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, diagram) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_images_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., explanatory, instructional) */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_videos_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the file belongs to */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the link belongs to */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., website, database) */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_links_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
